## What changed

- Describe changes briefly

## Driven-By

- [ ] Link a GitHub comment/issue/discussion that triggered this work
- Source: `https://github.com/<org>/<repo>/...`

## Why

- Describe motivation and expected impact

## TDD checklist

- [ ] Added or updated tests first (Red)
- [ ] Implemented minimal change to pass tests (Green)
- [ ] Refactored with tests still passing (Refactor)
- [ ] `go test ./... -count=1` passed locally
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passed locally

## Risk

- [ ] No behavior change
- [ ] Behavior change is documented
